subcodes.first_line: O you who are firm in the Covenant! The letter you had written me was like an unrolled scroll
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان لوح مسطور رق منشور بود اشارات بشارات بود و تلویح عین تصریح
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat], @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @charitable associations; humanitarian activities, @education of children; moral education
